phrases.text_local: Pode perguntar ao bilheteiro das Piscinas do Lido sobre a entrada do Jardim do Lido.
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo DUHSH pee-SEE-nuhsh DOO LEE-doo SOHB-rih AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO LEE-doo.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar ao bilheteiro das Piscinas do Lido sobre a entrada do Jardim do Lido.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo DUHSH pee-SEE-nuhsh DOO LEE-doo SOHB-rih AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO LEE-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask the ticket seller at Lido Pools about the entrance to Jardim do Lido.

responses.english: You can ask the ticket seller at Lido Pools about the entrance to Jardim do Lido.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo DUHSH pee-SEE-nuhsh DOO LEE-doo SOHB-rih AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO LEE-doo.
responses.local: Pode perguntar ao bilheteiro das Piscinas do Lido sobre a entrada do Jardim do Lido.

phrases.text_local: Onde é o chuveiro obrigatório para entrar nas piscinas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW shoo-VAY-roo awb-ree-guh-TAWR-yoo PUH-ruh ayngt-RAHR NUHSH pee-SEE-nuhsh?

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar ao guarda-piscinas, que lhe indicará o local exato.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW GWAH-ruh-duh-pee-SEE-nuhsh, KIH LYIH een-dee-kuh-RAH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask the pool guard, who will tell you the exact location.

responses.english: You can ask the pool guard, who will tell you the exact location.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW GWAH-ruh-duh-pee-SEE-nuhsh, KIH LYIH een-dee-kuh-RAH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
responses.local: Pode perguntar ao guarda-piscinas, que lhe indicará o local exato.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the mandatory shower is
phrases.cultural_note: Mandatory showers are standard before beach access in Portugal, usually located near entrances.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guarda-piscinas ou ao bilheteiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GWAH-ruh-duh-pee-SEE-nuhsh OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the pool guard or the ticket seller.

responses.english: Ask the pool guard or the ticket seller.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GWAH-ruh-duh-pee-SEE-nuhsh OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guarda-piscinas ou ao bilheteiro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jardim do Lido entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Jardim do Lido?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO LEE-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Jardim do Lido é um jardim público à beira-mar no Funchal.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim do Lido.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO LEE-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Jardim do Lido.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Jardim do Lido.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DOO LEE-doo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim do Lido.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the mandatory shower is
phrases.cultural_note: O chuveiro obrigatório é uma norma de higiene comum em piscinas públicas portuguesas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cable car station is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a estação do teleférico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH shtuh-SOWN DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese service staff typically give concise, direct directions without extra pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Estação do Teleférico.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Cable Car Station.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Cable Car Station.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH shtuh-SOWN DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo.
responses.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a Estação do Teleférico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cable car station is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la stazione del teleférico?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, DOH-vih LUH stuh-ZEEOH-nih DEHL teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The cable car station is a key landmark in Funchal, often used for transportation to Monte.

likely_response.local: Alla fine della Avenida do Mar.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH-luh FEE-nih DEH-luh uh-vih-NEE-duh DOO MAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of Avenida do Mar.

responses.english: At the end of Avenida do Mar.
responses.phonetic: AH-luh FEE-nih DEH-luh uh-vih-NEE-duh DOO MAHR.
responses.local: Alla fine della Avenida do Mar.
